losing_trades.thesis: Record revenue with strong AI networking/custom silicon franchise and balanced RSI offers entry without chasing. Buffett-style: durable moat, strong cash generation, dominant in AI connectivity.
losing_trades.lesson: Verify thesis confirmation before full sizing.

losing_trades.thesis: (1) Macro: VIX 16.29 with HY spreads at 2.75bps and a +30bps curve keep the semi-cap cycle bid, Fed Funds at 3.63% below 10Y 4.38%. (2) Company catalyst: AMAT posted record Q2 earnings beat driving the stock to a 52-week high, Citi reiterating on the print. (3) Entry trigger: RSI 60.5 with a 52-week-high breakout confirmed above $213.00 on expanding volume. (4) MA confirmation: price sits above the 50-day ~$198.00 and 200-day ~$185.00, a +7.0% gap that signals sustained uptrend. (5) Balance sheet: cash $7.2B vs modest debt, D/E 0.27, retained earnings compounding with an active buyback — BS score 10/10. (6) Sizing: $18,000 deployed = 9.8% of the $183k portfolio, leaves ~$47,589 cash, room for 3 more full-size positions. (7) Stop at $195.96 (-8%), target $255.60 (+20%), R:R = 2.5:1 — a break back below the 50-day $198.00 would trigger the stop.
losing_trades.lesson: Verify thesis confirmation before full sizing.
